sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n87766" key="prokatorrwde/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προκατ-ορρωδέω</orth>, <sense id="n87766.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fear</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">dread beforehand,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0648.tlg001.perseus-grc1:4:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Onos.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.2</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
